description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and set GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle. Define a build stage with a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, caching the build and .gradle directories with push policy, and runs the command gradle --build-cache shadowJar. The job runs in the build stage and has no additional triggers or artifacts.
